note: round6 = Stage-2 DATA-SCALING (audio), on the FROZEN config (ti2/ep3/lr3e-4/r32-a64/c_attn/chunk_ms1000). Sweeps stream length via audio_clips to trace how the online delta GROWS with data (amortization) and where it plateaus / crosses static. ljspeech (general speech) is the representative dev set (clic2024 is image-only; audio stays on ljspeech). NEEDS >=256 clips present: python scripts/download_audio.py --dataset ljspeech --limit 256. mode=both + no_decompress -> static_rate + online_rate + delta per run. Plot both vs audio_clips -> plateau = headline size, crossover = where online first beats static. Optional 2nd curve: copy this grid with data=nsynth (homogeneous -> saturates earlier).
